- Fix push subscription VAPID key mismatch: auto-unsubscribe and resubscribe
  when server VAPID key changes (old subscriptions return 410 Gone)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lower similarity threshold from 0.6 to 0.4 for real-world face matching

0.6 was too strict — only near-identical photos matched. ArcFace cosine
similarity for the same person across different photos typically falls in
the 0.30–0.55 range. 0.4 balances accuracy with real-world conditions
(different lighting, angle, expression).

commit.message:
Replace bash start.sh with Python startup.py for Railway

Bash-based start.sh produces zero container output on Railway,
making debugging impossible. Python startup.py:
- Uses sys.stdout with flush=True (guaranteed visible output)
- Prints full diagnostics (PORT, DATABASE_URL, PATH, Python version)
- Tests Django settings import before starting gunicorn
- Falls back to a minimal HTTP server if gunicorn crashes
- Catches and prints ALL exceptions with tracebacks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix idle bots, Bloodwine loop, and explorer dominance

1. Fleet-wide unsellable item blacklist (GameCache): items that fail to
   sell are marked for 30 min across ALL traders, not just per-session.
   Prevents Crimson Bloodwine withdraw→fail→redeposit→repeat loop.

2. Nerf explorer guaranteed-slot bonus from -55 to -15. Explorer was
   scoring ~104, dominating all productive routines (miner=70, crafter=75).

3. Miner fallback: bots with 3+ rapid-completed routines get assigned
   miner unconditionally — always has productive work available.

UI 렌더링 완전 수정: ANSI 절대위치 지정 + BufferHeight 고정으로 스크롤/헤더 문제 해결

[요청] "선택된거 표시가 안보여 전체 제대로 점검해서 한번에 해결되게 해"

- 각 줄을 \e[row;1H ANSI 절대위치로 렌더링 (newline 스크롤 방지)
- BufferHeight = WindowHeight 고정으로 스크롤백 차단
- 프로젝트 수가 창 높이 초과 시 자동 페이징 + 스크롤 정보 표시

commit.message:
feat: add incremental indexing to index_local and index_repo

- DocStore.detect_changes() — compares file hashes to find changed/new/deleted docs
- DocStore.incremental_save() — drops sections for removed files, merges new ones,
  updates raw file cache and file_hashes atomically
- index_local: incremental=True by default; skips unchanged files entirely, returns
  early with "No changes detected" when nothing has changed
- index_repo: same incremental path for GitHub repos
- 7 new tests covering detect_changes, incremental_save, deletion, and byte-range
  content retrieval after an incremental update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: enrich boundary docs with complete codebase analysis (Phase E)

- boundary-definition: Complete file inventory (286 files), full import graph,
  Prisma model table with FK relationships, promoted code precedent
- shared-dependencies: Detailed outbound dependency catalog by coupling level,
  decoupling strategy per dependency, NPM package inventory, 8-step
  decoupling priority sequence
- extraction-plan: 4-phase plan with step-by-step instructions, database
  boundary options (schema namespacing vs separate DB), frontend extraction
  approaches, deployment architecture, decision log
- api-contract-draft: Full endpoint catalog (public, internal v6→Nexus,
  internal Nexus→v6), auth matrix, error handling, pagination, WebSocket spec

Add cell 73: d_model=1024 + n_layers=4 sweep + updated unified table

d=1024 with n_layers∈{3,4} and dropout∈{0.1,0.2,0.3} (shifted lower

larger capacity. Part 2 updates full unified table and scaling summary.

commit.message:
Interrupt active Claude call when user sends new message mid-thinking

If a user sends a message while Claude is already processing, kill the
Claude process, delete the Thinking message, and re-buffer all prior
messages + the new one with a fresh 5s debounce.

commit.message:
Replace separate backend with Vercel serverless functions

- ui/api/parse.js: PDF/DOCX text extraction + Claude resume parsing
- ui/api/email.js: AI-powered email draft generation (3 tones)
- ui/src/utils/matcher.js: client-side faculty matching (no backend needed)
- Discover.jsx: converts file to base64, calls /api/parse directly
- Match.jsx: runs matching client-side using faculty.json via AppContext
- EmailModal.jsx: calls /api/email (Vercel function, no backend)
- ProfDetail.jsx: pass session object to updated EmailModal
- vercel.json: add SPA rewrites so /discover and /match work on refresh
- package.json: add @anthropic-ai/sdk, mammoth, pdf-parse

Everything runs free on Vercel — no Railway/Render needed.

Tune summary post-processing: raise threshold, enforce 3 sentences

Raised enhancement trigger from <25 to <28 words to catch more short
summaries. Enforce "exactly 3 sentences" in enhance prompt. Accept any
enhanced result that's longer than the original.

commit.message:
feat: PollingAgent のセッション自動ローテーション (#72)

* feat: PollingAgent のセッション自動ローテーション

セッション作成から一定時間（デフォルト48時間、SESSION_MAX_AGE_HOURS で変更可）
経過後にセッションを削除・再作成し、会話履歴の無限蓄積を防止する。
LTM と .md ファイルからブートストラップコンテキストが復元されるため、
セッションクリア後も人格・記憶は維持される。

- SessionRepository ポートに delete メソッドを追加
- JsonSessionRepository に delete を実装
- PollingAgent に rotateSessionIfExpired() を追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: sessionCreatedAt を永続化しプロセス再起動時のリセットを防止

- SessionRepository に getCreatedAt メソッドを追加
- JsonSessionRepository で save 時に createdAt を自動記録（メタキー方式）
- PollingAgent が既存セッション復元時に永続化された createdAt を参照
- ARCHITECTURE.md に SESSION_MAX_AGE_HOURS と delete()/count() を追記
- JsonSessionRepository のユニットテストを追加（11 tests）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

fix: move loadRagasFromFirestore() after Firebase init to resolve TDZ crash

Previous commit accidentally placed the loadRagasFromFirestore() call (line 2221)
before the `let auth, db` declaration (line 2234), causing a JavaScript temporal
dead zone ReferenceError: Cannot access 'db' before initialization — making the
entire raga list disappear.

two data types in the point selector. Compass directions on world map
